title: Code Understanding Example
subtitle: Explain a module map, data flow, or code path.

sections.heading: Code Understanding in use
sections.body: Use this template to explain a code path with a compact module map, a data flow diagram, and the files a maintainer should read first.

cards.title: Payload builder
cards.body: Creates validated examples for each template id and keeps the gallery deterministic.

cards.title: Renderer
cards.body: Converts structured sections into a single offline HTML document with embedded CSS and script.

cards.title: Checker
cards.body: Validates that generated output contains the expected shell, tokens, and template marker.

rows: Defines template ids, labels, families, and interaction promises
Defines the safe portable payload contract
